content: Steam sẽ link với mobile bản HK
Là Sialia hay qookka v ông

Deep Sea Symbiosis: Reworked. At the start of exploration, for each Chaos Awakened in the team, the base tentacle damage is increased by 1% of the team's maximum health, and the tentacle damage gained by this effect is increased by Damage Enhancement. After the Chaos Awakened releases a Madness Burst, at the end of the round, it drives an additional tentacle to attack the enemy and all Deep Sea Awakened gain 10 Madness.
Flesh and Blood Symbiosis: Crimson Furnace increased from 1.5% to 2% of maximum health.
Transdimensional Symbiosis: Reworked. At the start of combat, for each Chaos Awakened in the team, reduce the Strength of all enemies by 0.5% of the team's maximum health, increase the Strength of the team by 1% of the team's maximum health, and increase the critical damage of all Transdimensional Awakened by 10%.
story của biển cũng kết thúc
